      name: "shared-ro-pv"

### Architecture Overview

**PV/PVC Model:**
1. **Cluster-level PVs** (cluster-scoped) - Created once at service startup
   - `shared-rw-pv` (ReadWriteMany, JuiceFS CSI)
   - `shared-ro-pv` (ReadOnlyMany, JuiceFS CSI)

   - Deduplication: max 2 volumes per pod (RW + RO)

**Storage Isolation Strategy:**
- Cluster-level: CSI JuiceFS driver provides storage backend
- Namespace-level: PVCs provide namespace isolation
- Pod-level: SubPath provides user/project isolation within namespace PVC

This architecture enables multi-tenant shared storage with proper isolation at each level.

package devmachine

// 常量定义
// Constants for dev machine status
const (
	DevMachineLabel      = "app.kubernetes.io/name=dev-machine"
	DevMachineNameFormat = "%s-%s"
	initContainerName    = "dev-bootstrap"
	vscodePort           = 8080
	jupyterPort          = 8888
	// Volume 相关
	volcanoQueueName           = "scheduling.volcano.sh/queue-name"
	volcanoSchedulerName       = "volcano"
	devVolumeName              = "dev-volume"
	bootstrapJupyterVolumeName = "bootstrap-jupyter"
	// 共享存储相关
	SharedRWPVCName    = "shared-rw-pvc"    // namespace 级别读写共享 PVC 名称
	SharedROPVCName    = "shared-ro-pvc"    // namespace 级别只读共享 PVC 名称
	SharedRWVolumeName = "shared-rw-volume" // Pod spec 中读写共享 volume 名称
	SharedROVolumeName = "shared-ro-volume" // Pod spec 中只读共享 volume 名称
	// Service 相关
	serviceSuffix = "-svc"
	// Ingress 相关
	ingressSuffix  = "-ingress"
	devMachineName = "%s-%s"
)

var defaultAnnotations = map[string]string{
	"nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/configuration-snippet":  "more_clear_headers \"Content-Security-Policy\";\nadd_header Content-Security-Policy \"frame-ancestors *;\" always;",
	"nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/enable-cors":            "true",
	"nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/cors-allow-credentials": "true",
	"nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/cors-allow-origin":      "*",

- 2 cluster-level PVs (`shared-rw-pv`, `shared-ro-pv`) created at startup
- Multiple namespace PVCs all try to bind to the same PVs
- K8s rule: A PV can only be bound to ONE PVC
- So only the first namespace that creates PVCs gets them; others fail

- Each namespace's `CreateNamespace` will handle creating its own pair of PVs and PVCs

|---|---|---|

| PVC 绑定 | 多个 namespace 的 PVC 绑同一个 PV（K8s 不允许）| 每个 namespace PVC 绑自己专属的 PV |

func getLatestPod(pods []*corev1.Pod) *corev1.Pod {
	latest := pods[0]
	for _, pod := range pods[1:] {
		if pod.CreationTimestamp.After(latest.CreationTimestamp.Time) {
			latest = pod
		}
	}
	return latest
}

	// Pod 正在被删除
	if pod.DeletionTimestamp != nil {
		return devmachinemodel.StatusTerminating, "", "开发机正在关闭", false
	}

		return getRunningStatusDetail(pod)
	case corev1.PodFailed:

	case corev1.PodSucceeded:
		return devmachinemodel.StatusStopped, "", "容器已正常退出", false
	default:
		return devmachinemodel.StatusUnknown, "", "", false
	}
}

// getPendingStatusDetail 细化 Pending 阶段的具体状态
func getPendingStatusDetail(pod *corev1.Pod) (status, reason, message string, ready bool) {
	// 1. 检查是否已完成调度
	for _, cond := range pod.Status.Conditions {
		if cond.Type == corev1.PodScheduled && cond.Status != corev1.ConditionTrue {
			return devmachinemodel.StatusScheduling, cond.Reason, cond.Message, false
		}
	}

	// 2. 检查 Init 容器状态（Init 容器按序执行，逐个检查）
	for i, cs := range pod.Status.InitContainerStatuses {
		if cs.State.Terminated != nil && cs.State.Terminated.ExitCode != 0 {
			return devmachinemodel.StatusFailed, cs.State.Terminated.Reason,
				fmt.Sprintf("Init容器 %s 执行失败: %s", cs.Name, cs.State.Terminated.Message), false
		}
		if cs.State.Running != nil {
			total := len(pod.Spec.InitContainers)
			return devmachinemodel.StatusInitializing, "",
				fmt.Sprintf("Init容器运行中 (%d/%d): %s", i+1, total, cs.Name), false
		}
		if cs.State.Waiting != nil {
			r := cs.State.Waiting.Reason
			switch r {
			case "ErrImagePull", "ImagePullBackOff":
				return devmachinemodel.StatusFailed, r,
					fmt.Sprintf("Init容器 %s 镜像拉取失败: %s", cs.Name, cs.State.Waiting.Message), false
			default:
				return devmachinemodel.StatusInitializing, r,
					fmt.Sprintf("Init容器 %s 等待中", cs.Name), false
			}
		}
	}

	// 3. 检查主容器状态
	for _, cs := range pod.Status.ContainerStatuses {
		if cs.State.Waiting != nil {
			r := cs.State.Waiting.Reason
			switch r {
			case "ErrImagePull", "ImagePullBackOff":
				return devmachinemodel.StatusFailed, r, "镜像拉取失败: " + cs.State.Waiting.Message, false
			case "CrashLoopBackOff":
				return devmachinemodel.StatusFailed, r, "容器反复崩溃重启", false
			case "ContainerCreating":
				return devmachinemodel.StatusStarting, r, "容器启动中", false
			default:
				msg := cs.State.Waiting.Message
				if msg == "" {
					msg = "容器等待中"
				}
				return devmachinemodel.StatusStarting, r, msg, false
			}
		}
	}

	// 已调度但尚无容器状态，说明还在拉取镜像
	return devmachinemodel.StatusPullingImage, "", "拉取镜像中", false
}

// getRunningStatusDetail 细化 Running 阶段的具体状态（容器可能还未 Ready）
func getRunningStatusDetail(pod *corev1.Pod) (status, reason, message string, ready bool) {
	for _, cs := range pod.Status.ContainerStatuses {
		if cs.State.Waiting != nil {
			r := cs.State.Waiting.Reason
			if r == "CrashLoopBackOff" {
				return devmachinemodel.StatusFailed, r, "容器反复崩溃重启", false
			}
			return devmachinemodel.StatusStarting, r, "容器启动中", false

			if r == "OOMKilled" {
